title: PolyNutrition
description: A Polymer-based server side mod for seeing how much hunger and saturation food items will replenish. Works in singleplayer!
body:
PolyNutrition is a Polymer-based server side mod for seeing how much hunger and saturation food items will replenish. 

This mod works as long as it is installed on the server, and even vanilla clients can use it!

Works on singleplayer, too.

**NOTE**: Creative mode is a little bugged. I can't do anything about it. Throwing the item out of your inventory and then picking it back up, or reconnecting with the items in your inventory should fix it.
